creator: xj.dropbox+freebsd@gmail.com
text: Grafana OSS indeed isn't impacted according to the blog. Grafana did however release new OSS versions 7.5.16 and 8.5.3 marked with "Security: Fixes CVE-2022-29170". See https://github.com/grafana/grafana/releases . That was my trigger to err on the safe side and provide a patch to keep track of the upstream OSS version.
